title: Secure Enterprise Network
description: Designed and implemented a secure enterprise network featuring VLAN segmentation, inter-VLAN routing, DHCP, RIP v2, and Cisco ASA firewall integration. Hardened the network with access control lists (ACLs) and SSH management.

title: CyberSpace
description: Developed a full-stack threat intelligence platform offering bulk WHOIS lookups, automated password auditing, active phishing link detection, domain reputation analysis, and VirusTotal integration for real-time file hash verification.

title: Grasshopper
description: Designed and developed a beginner-friendly vulnerable Ubuntu virtual machine for ethical hacking labs. Configured with misconfigured SSH, FTP, Telnet, MySQL, and custom HTTP web challenges to simulate practical penetration testing pathways.
